center.name: Bibile
center.summary: Bibile是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Painted francolin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in drier areas than the black francolin but wetter zones than the grey francolin. In Sri Lanka, it is found in Bibila and Nilgala forest reserve of Gal Oya National Park in Uva plains

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in drier areas than the black francolin but wetter zones than the grey francolin. In Sri Lanka, it is found in Bibila and Nilgala forest reserve of Gal Oya National Park in Uva plains
